title: Kafka
description: Monitor Kafka brokers, consumer lag, partition offsets, and replication health

metrics.name: kafka_brokers
metrics.description: Number of brokers detected in the cluster.

metrics.name: kafka_consumer_group_lag
metrics.description: Approximate lag of a consumer group per topic partition.

metrics.name: kafka_consumer_group_lag_sum
metrics.description: Approximate lag of a consumer group across all partitions in a topic.

metrics.name: kafka_partition_replicas_in_sync
metrics.description: Number of in-sync replicas for a partition.

metrics.name: kafka_topic_partitions
metrics.description: Number of partitions in a topic.
